test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block resource with all four block settings enabled
An aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block resource with block_public_acls set to false
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating block_public_acls must be true

test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block resource with block_public_policy set to false
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating block_public_policy must be true

test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block resource with ignore_public_acls set to false
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating ignore_public_acls must be true

test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block resource with restrict_public_buckets set to false
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating restrict_public_buckets must be true

test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_acl resource with acl set to 'private'
An aws_s3_bucket_acl resource with acl set to 'public-read'
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating public ACLs are not allowed

test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_acl resource with acl set to 'public-read-write'
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating public ACLs are not allowed

test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_policy resource with a policy that does not grant public access
An aws_s3_bucket_policy resource with Principal '*' and Allow effect for s3:GetObject
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating public read access is not allowed

test_scenarios.given: An aws_s3_bucket_policy resource with Principal '*' and Allow effect for s3:ListBucket
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with error indicating public read access is not allowed
